title: centaurea zuvandica
intro: Centaurea zuvandica, also known as Zuvaran or Iranian Knapweed, is a flowering plant species belonging to the family Asteraceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Centaurea zuvandica include its ability to alleviate respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. Centaurea zuvandica is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
